name: ClusterCAD Search Domains
description: Search all PKS clusters in ClusterCAD for modules containing domains matching specified type and annotation criteria using a local cache for fast lookup. Common substrate names are automatically translated to ClusterCAD annotation terms.

inputs.name: domain_type
inputs.description: Domain type to search for. Valid types: AT, KS, KR, DH, ER, ACP, TE, KS, C, A, PCP. Case insensitive.

inputs.name: annotation_contains
inputs.description: Optional text to search for in domain annotations. Common names are auto-translated: malonyl→mal, methylmalonyl→mmal, ethylmalonyl→emal, butyryl/butylmalonyl→butmal, hexylmalonyl→hxmal, hydroxymalonyl→hmal, methoxymalonyl→mxmal, isobutyryl→isobut, propionyl→prop, acetyl→Acetyl-CoA, pyruvate→pyr. You can also search for 'loading', 'non-loading', 'active', 'inactive'. Case insensitive.

inputs.name: loading_module_only
inputs.description: If true, only return results from loading modules (module 0). Defaults to false.

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

inputs.name: force_refresh
inputs.description: If true, re-downloads all cluster data and rebuilds the cache. Use this if the database has been updated. Defaults to false.

outputs.description: List of matching results, each with 'accession', 'description', 'subunit_name', 'subunit_id', 'module', 'product_smiles', and 'matching_domains'.
